CHIP_ENRLMT_DAYS_YR 
LABEL: 
CHIP Enrollment Days — Total in Year 
DESCRIPTION: Number of days of CHIP enrollment in the calendar year.

LONG NAME: CHIP_ENRLMT_DAYS_YR

NUM

3

SOURCE:

VALUES:
